name: pb
description: Product Builder v1.11.0 — registry-backed prototype builder that projects one registry.json into two deterministic sites (a 4-tab prototype + a live design-system site), with a cheap build loop, a small memory layer, a design-system-agnostic core, a two-mode hand-off, an agent-powered testing sandbox, and a multi-agent orchestrator. Provides /pb:init, /pb:specify, /pb:clarify, /pb:plan, /pb:orchestrate, /pb:build (+ check-design-system, figma-handoff), /pb:pull-ds, /pb:preview, /pb:preview-ds, /pb:test, /pb:explore, /pb:flow, /pb:data, /pb:check-drift, /pb:handoff-close, /pb:validate, /pb:handoff-dev, /pb:update-version.
